_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating the trustworthiness of the supplier and/or product.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical executive stakeholders in terms of business risk and operational impact.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-008 (OP, cosine: 0.485), DQ-K-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.402). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [evaluating, product, supplier, trustworthiness] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, communicating, data, executive, impact, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.846 (P=0.847, R=0.845). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in evaluating the trustworthiness of the supplier and/or product." and "Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical execu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 > STS 0.402 (gap +0.094). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [evaluating, product, supplier, trustworthiness]. WIDAI-only: [business, communicating, data, executive, impact, issues].
